scripts.start: npm run build:tokens && npm start --prefix apps/site

scripts.dev: npm run build:tokens && npm start --prefix apps/site
scripts.start:wealth-manager: npm run build:tokens && npm start --prefix apps/wealth-manager

scripts.start:wealth-planner: npm run build:tokens && npm start --prefix apps/wealth-planner
scripts.build:wealth-planner: npm run build:tokens && npm run build --prefix apps/wealth-planner
scripts.start:wealth-manager-primeng: npm run build:tokens && npm start --prefix apps/wealth-manager-primeng
